MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Apr-17-2026 Continued To May-21-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT MAN-KIT LEUNG MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.

In light of Plaintiff's request for a continuance under Code of Civil Procedure section 437c, subdivision (h), this motion is continued to be heard on May 21, 2026, which is the last possible day this court can hear this motion given the current trial date. Any issues with the trial date are to be raised with Department 206.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
